body.raw:
{
  "plannedShippingDateAndTime": "{{planned_shipping_date}}", // changeable
  "productCode": "P", // fixed
  "payerCountryCode": "{{ng_code}}", // fixed
  "unitOfMeasurement": "metric", // fixed
  "isCustomsDeclarable": true, // fixed
  "nextBusinessDay": true, // fixed
  "accounts": [
    { // fixed
      "number": "{{import_acct}}",
      "typeCode": "shipper"
    }
  ],
  "customerDetails": { // changeable
    "shipperDetails": {
      "addressLine1": "Address 1 Compulsory, 45characters",
      "addressLine2": "Address 2 Optional, 45characters",
      "addressLine3": "Address 3 Optional, 45characters",
      "postalCode": "{{ng_1_postal}}",
      "cityName": "{{ng_1_city}}",
      "countyName": "{{ng_1_county}}",
      "countryCode": "{{ng_code}}"
    },
    "receiverDetails": {
      "addressLine1": "Address 1 Compulsory, 45characters",
      "addressLine2": "Address 2 Optional, 45characters",
      "addressLine3": "Address 3 Optional, 45characters",
      "postalCode": "{{gh_1_postal}}",
      "cityName": "{{gh_1_city}}",
      "countyName": "{{gh_1_county}}",
      "countryCode": "{{gh_code}}"
    }
  },
  "packages": [
    { // changeable
      "weight": 3.0,
      "dimensions": {
        "length": 45,
        "width": 25,
        "height": 5
      }
    }
  ]
}
